---
title: Talks

output:
  html_document:
    keep_md: yes
---
## Talks
```{r results = 'asis',echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)

read_csv('talks.csv') |> 
  arrange(desc(Date)) |> 
  knitr::kable() |> 
  kable_styling(fixed_thead = T)
```
